error_signature: Document Content field missing in Create Document operation
title: Missing Document Content field in Google Docs node
symptom: The Google Docs node does not display the Document Content field when trying to create a document, only the Title field is visible.
not_this_if: Document Content field is visible in the node settings
root_cause: This issue may arise due to a bug in the Google Docs node or a temporary glitch in the UI that prevents the Document Content field from being displayed during the document creation process.
fix_steps: Create the document using the Google Docs node with only the Title field.
Use a separate module to update the document with the content using the same document ID.
agent_instruction: Create the document first, then update it with the content using the document ID.
